# keyUsage

**Instance Property**

An array containing usage attributes applied to a key on import.

## Declaration

```swift
var keyUsage: Unmanaged<CFArray>?
```

## Discussion

The array may contain any of the following key usage constants:

- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrCanEncrypt]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrCanDecrypt]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrCanDerive]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrCanSign]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrCanVerify]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrCanWrap]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrCanUnwrap]

If the array is `NULL`, all operations are allowed by default.
title: keyUsage
